# Source Lanes for Manhwa Recap Research

## Verified Platform Rules
- WEBTOON CANVAS creator docs: https://webtooncanvas.zendesk.com/
- Tapas creator docs: https://help.tapas.io/
- YouTube creator docs: https://www.youtube.com/creators/

## Industry and Market Context
- KOCCA/Welcon reports: https://welcon.kocca.kr/
- Korean culture webtoon coverage: https://www.korean-culture.org/

## Audio and SFX Libraries
- Freesound: https://freesound.org/
- Zapsplat: https://www.zapsplat.com/
- Pixabay SFX: https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/

## Benchmark Recap Videos
- User benchmark seed: https://youtu.be/J0qWh_qK-oc?si=6kWYRC5XHzsdT3r6

## Lane Quality Rules
1. Prefer official docs for format and policy constraints.
2. Treat creator videos as style references, not policy truth.
3. Record source URL per claim in lane outputs.
4. Flag uncertain claims as `needs-verification` before publish.
